name: Balanced Green Plan
lunch: Grilled chicken, brown rice, and vegetable soup
dinner: Steamed fish, sweet potato, and mixed greens
note: Simple balanced meals for everyday health.

name: Light Fit Plan
breakfast: Boiled eggs, whole wheat toast, and cucumber
dinner: Chicken soup with carrots and mushrooms
note: A lighter plan with more vegetables and lean protein.

name: Energy Plus Plan
breakfast: Greek yogurt, granola, apple, and nuts
lunch: Rice bowl with salmon, egg, and greens
dinner: Lean beef stew with potatoes and vegetables
note: A higher-energy option for busy working days.
